name: Super Mario Brothers Eternal Welcome Decks

cards.rules_text:
Flying [i](This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)[/i]
When Luigi enters, draw three cards, then discard a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Get this, Bro. I came up with a new game. I call it Balloon World.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Menace [i](This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)[/i]
Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, you gain 1 life and create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with “This token can't block.”

During your turn, Mario has flying. [i](He can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)[/i]
Whenever Mario enters or attacks, create a Treasure token. [i](It's an artifact with “{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.”)[/i]
Treasures you control have “{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add two mana of any one color.”

Enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
When Princess Peach enters, return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

Trample [i](This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)[/i]
Ward {1} [i](Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)[/i]
Whenever DK attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on him and up to one other target creature you control.

As long as you control another legendary creature, Diddy Kong has vigilance. [i](Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)[/i]
[i]Landfall[/i] — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Diddy Kong.

Menace [i](This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)[/i]
Haste [i](This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]“You messed with my Dad, you messed with the Minions... now you have to answer to me!”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flash [i](You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)[/i]
When Toad enters, you may return another permanent you control and all Auras attached to that permanent to their owner's hand.

{T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast noncreature spells.
{2}{U}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn.

Haste [i](This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)[/i]
Whenever Princess Daisy becomes tapped, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Princess Peach's pet rabbit, it flits around the castle wherever it pleases, picking up shiny objects.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Defender [i](This creature can't attack.)[/i]
As long as you've drawn two or more cards this turn, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

Expendable 1 [i](When this creature dies, create a 1/1 black Minion creature token with “This token can't block.”)[/i]
When this creature dies, you lose 1 life and draw a card.

Reach [i](This creature can block creatures with flying.)[/i]
Whenever this creature attacks, it deals 1 damage to defending player.

Trample [i](This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)[/i]
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has double strike. [i](That creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.)[/i]
{3}{R}: Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

Choose target creature you control and target creature you don't control. Double the number of +1/+1 counters on the creature you control, then it deals damage equal to its power to the creature you don't control.
Exile target creature. Its controller exiles a card from their hand and loses 2 life.
cards.artist: Results May Vary; Next Level games

cards.rules_text:
Return one or two target artifact, instant, and/or sorcery cards from your graveyard to your hand.
Exile Luigi's Determination.

Whenever you attack, create a Super token attached to target attacking creature you control and scry 1. [i](A Super token is a colorless Aura enchantment with enchant creature and “Enchanted creature gets +1/+1.” To scry, look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)[/i]
